title: Create a lesson booking with a teacher
description: A logged-in student or parent can create a booking from a teacher profile and see confirmation that the booking was created.

steps.description: Navigate to /accounts/login/
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open an approved teacher profile
Create a booking with a valid lesson time and slot details
Verify the booking is created
Verify a booking confirmation is displayed

title: Register and reach the correct dashboard
description: A new student can register with valid details and is taken to the appropriate authenticated dashboard after account creation.

steps.description: Navigate to /accounts/register/
Fill in the registration form with valid student details
Submit the registration form
Verify account creation succeeds
Verify the user lands on the appropriate dashboard

title: Log in and reach the role dashboard
description: An existing user can log in with valid credentials and is redirected to their role-specific dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /accounts/login/
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify authentication succeeds
Verify the user lands on the role dashboard

title: Browse approved teachers and open a teacher profile
description: A visitor can view the public teacher list, open an approved teacher profile, and see the profile details they need to evaluate the teacher.

steps.description: Navigate to /teachers/
Verify approved teachers are displayed
Open an approved teacher profile
Verify detailed teacher profile information is displayed

title: Cancel an existing booking
description: A logged-in student or parent can cancel a cancellable booking and see the booking status update afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /accounts/login/
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the bookings page
Open a cancellable booking
Cancel the booking
Verify a cancellation confirmation is displayed
Verify the updated booking status is visible

title: View booking list and open booking details
description: A logged-in student or parent can see their bookings in the list and open an existing booking to review its schedule and status.

steps.description: Navigate to /accounts/login/
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the bookings page
Open an existing booking
Verify booking details are displayed
Verify the booking status is visible

title: Set up a teacher profile and await approval
description: An authenticated teacher can complete profile setup and see confirmation that the profile is pending admin review before becoming publicly visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /accounts/login/
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the teacher profile setup page
Complete the teacher profile setup form with valid information
Submit the teacher profile setup form
Verify profile setup completion is displayed
Verify a pending review state is visible

title: Manage account profile and return to the dashboard
description: An authenticated user can open their profile page, make profile changes, and return to the appropriate dashboard after saving.

steps.description: Navigate to /accounts/login/
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the profile page
Update the profile information with valid changes
Save the profile changes
Verify the profile update succeeds
Verify the user is returned to the role dashboard

title: Show booking conflict validation for overlapping lesson times
description: A logged-in student or parent who tries to create an overlapping booking sees a validation error and the booking is not created.

steps.description: Navigate to /accounts/login/
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open an approved teacher profile
Create a booking with an overlapping lesson time
Verify a booking validation error is visible
Verify the conflicting booking is not created

title: Keep non-approved teacher profiles hidden publicly
description: A visitor cannot open a teacher profile that is not approved and sees a hidden or not found response instead.

steps.description: Navigate to /teachers/
Open a teacher profile that is not approved
Verify the teacher profile is not publicly accessible
Verify a hidden or not found response is shown

title: Prevent access to profile pages without signing in
description: An unauthenticated visitor who tries to open the profile area is blocked from viewing protected account information.

steps.description: Navigate to /accounts/profile/
Verify access is restricted
Verify a login prompt or access denied state is shown
